title: Perfume Key Visual Poster
sourceTitle: Luxury Perfume Key Visual Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: 9:16 luxury perfume key visual poster for Dawn Veil, expressing citrus floral musk through premium scent visualization. Subject: A refined perfume bottle stays centered as the hero object with high-end glass texture, elegant cap, realistic reflections, soft highlights, and brand-advertising polish. Scene: bergamot, white tea, jasmine petals, and soft musk appear as carefully selected scent materials around the bottle, floating with layered foreground/background depth, gentle motion, and an atmosphere of fixed source visual style, lighting, and render finish with concrete medium cues from the prompt. Composition: Fixed vertical luxury KV: large centered bottle, controlled negative space, scent materials unfolding around it like fragrance diffusion, top or upper-middle title, short subtitle, and restrained bottom copy. Signature Elements: Centered perfume hero bottle, visible scent-note materials, floating diffusion, layered depth, premium glass reflections, restrained typography, and luxury fragrance campaign mood. Fixed source details: Visual Mood: clear morning radiance. Style: Luxury fragrance advertising, premium product KV, cinematic light and shadow, realistic photography texture, delicate glass bottle, visualized scent notes, soft depth of field, and polished social/retail campaign finish. Color Palette: Fixed refined fragrance-campaign palette with luminous glass neutrals, soft atmospheric gradients, restrained metallic highlights, and mood-specific accents kept secondary to the hero bottle. Lighting: Cinematic product lighting with glass reflections, gentle bottle edge highlights, soft atmospheric haze, subtle floating-particle glow, and premium brand-poster depth. Typography: Dawn Veil appears as the main title; bergamot, white tea, jasmine petals, and soft musk appears as the short subtitle; Every breath feels like morning light appears as a brief elegant campaign line with generous whitespace. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

promptTranslations.en:
Generate a 9:16 vertical 'hero fragrance poster'.

Product Information:
Fragrance Name: THE NEW SIGNAL
Scent Family: minimal high-fashion floral woody fragrance
Key Notes: white iris, graphite musk, misted cedar, and silver amber
Mood & Atmosphere: minimal high-fashion campaign mood
Dominant Color: pearl white, graphite, mist blue, and silver

Visual Requirements:
Create a high-end fragrance brand advertisement poster—not a standard product shot or e-commerce detail page—but a luxury olfactory campaign–grade hero image.
Use 9:16 vertical composition. Center the perfume bottle as the hero object: large-scale, centrally placed, with premium glass transparency, an exquisitely crafted cap, realistic reflections, soft highlights, and advertising-grade lighting.
Scent-inspired elements organically orbit the bottle to visualize 'aroma made visible'. These may include petals, citrus rinds, wood shavings, resin droplets, leather swatches, wisps of smoke, water beads, light particles, silk ribbons, or mist—selected thoughtfully per scent family, not overloaded.
Focus is not on deconstructing the bottle, but on expressing aroma, materiality, emotion, and olfactive layering. Elements must convey spatial depth (foreground/midground/background), subtle levitation, and gentle motion—as if fragrance diffuses slowly outward from the bottle.

Typography Guidance:
Include minimal Chinese text—never overwhelming.
Top or upper-middle area:
Main headline: THE NEW SIGNAL
Sub-headline: white iris, graphite musk, misted cedar, and silver amber
Bottom area may feature a short poetic line, e.g.:
'Let every breath feel like dawn’s first light.'
or:
'Let night bloom softly with each inhale.'
Text must evoke premium brand poster sensibility: concise, restrained, generously spaced—never resembling technical specs or e-commerce copy.

Style Requirements:
Luxury fragrance advertising, high-end poster aesthetic, photorealistic texture, cinematic lighting, exquisite glass bottle rendering, scent visualization, strong atmospheric presence, soft depth of field, refined material detail, brand hero visual, 9:16 vertical.

Avoid:
Pure-white e-commerce product backgrounds.
Generic still-life setups.
Chaotic or flying elements.
Excessive floral clutter (e.g., wedding-style overload).
Overly dense text.
Excessive cyberpunk styling.
Cheap plastic质感.
Cluttered or busy backgrounds.
Scent elements overpowering the bottle.
Final output should resemble a premium hero visual suitable for fragrance launch campaigns, social media ads, key visuals (KV), boutique window displays, or olfactory storytelling initiatives.
product: architectural perfume bottle. fictional brand: Vellum Atelier. campaign mood: minimal high-fashion campaign mood. color palette: pearl white, graphite, mist blue, and silver controls the palette, accents, background, and supporting visual elements. typography: visible headline: "THE NEW SIGNAL".
